intro: Between April 8 and April 20, 2026, ZCyberNews published 23 reports on AI-related threats. The activity of the threat actor Pushpaganda was a primary focus. The majority of incidents were of high or informational severity, with a smaller number of critical and medium-severity events. These activities primarily targeted the critical_infrastructure, finance, government, manufacturing, and technology sectors. Geographically, the United states, Asia, Australia, Canada, and Japan were the most affected regions.
